name: Arrival at Outpost Dorn
description: A routine supply run to a remote outpost goes sideways when Imperial patrols lock down the sector.
narrativeIntro: Your team's light freighter drops out of hyperspace near the dusty world of Ord Varee. Outpost Dorn, a rebel supply cache hidden in an abandoned mining complex, should be a simple pickup. But your sensors light up with Imperial signatures. A patrol has found the outpost. You need to get in, secure the supplies, and get out before reinforcements arrive.
narrativeSuccess: With the last Stormtrooper down, your team secures the supply crates and loads them aboard the freighter. As the engines spool up, you catch a glimpse of a Star Destroyer emerging from hyperspace. You made it out just in time. The supplies will keep the cell running for another month.
narrativeFailure: The Imperials overwhelm your position. As you fall back to the ship empty-handed, you see the troopers torching the outpost. The supplies are lost, and the Empire now knows someone was interested in this location. This setback will cost the rebellion dearly.

reinforcements.narrativeText: A fresh squad of Stormtroopers arrives from the eastern corridor!
An Elite Stormtrooper sergeant enters through the blast doors!

objectives.description: Eliminate all Imperial forces in the outpost.
Secure the rebel supply crates (collect 2 loot tokens).

objectivePoints.description: Sealed supply crate -- pry open or unbolt the locking mechanism.
Sealed supply crate -- pry open or unbolt the locking mechanism.
